arts.ttl: Man Utd FORCED to make Victor Osimhen move
arts.sum: Benjamin Sesko, Alexander Isak and Liam Delap have all been associated with a move to Old Trafford, yet the Red Devils are set to miss out on all three, with the net result being that Osimhen is the last man standing. “I think at this stage, Chelsea are front-runners for Liam Delap, and the expectation is that whether Ipswich go down or stay up, he will likely leave this summer,” transfer news expert Ben Jacobs told GMS .
